description: dlfcn boundary policy for the phase-1 loader/resolver surface: native local/pathname handles plus explicit host-backed interpose delegation for remaining loader cases.

replacement_profile.transition_requirement: dlfcn_abi must remove host-resolve dlopen/dlsym/dlclose delegation before L2 replacement claims

support_matrix_contract.strict_semantics: Phase-1 native local/pathname loader surface with host-backed interpose delegation for remaining loader cases
support_matrix_contract.hardened_semantics: Phase-1 native local/pathname loader surface with RTLD_NOW healing for invalid dlopen flags and host-backed interpose delegation for remaining loader cases

strict_semantics_by_symbol.dlopen: Native phase-1 loader: NULL and recognized libc NOLOAD aliases return a local main-program handle; self-contained pathname ELF64 DSOs are mapped, relocated, and returned as native handles; unsupported pathname libraries return NULL with thread-local dlerror
strict_semantics_by_symbol.dlsym: Native exported-symbol resolver for RTLD_DEFAULT, RTLD_NEXT, the local main-program handle, and native pathname DSO handles with thread-local dlerror on misses
strict_semantics_by_symbol.dlclose: Native main-program handle close with deterministic refcounted invalid-handle rejection and thread-local dlerror contract

hardened_semantics_by_symbol.dlopen: Native phase-1 loader: invalid flags heal to RTLD_NOW; NULL and recognized libc NOLOAD aliases return a local main-program handle; self-contained pathname ELF64 DSOs are mapped, relocated, and returned as native handles; unsupported pathname libraries return NULL with thread-local dlerror
hardened_semantics_by_symbol.dlsym: Native exported-symbol resolver for RTLD_DEFAULT, RTLD_NEXT, the local main-program handle, and native pathname DSO handles with deterministic invalid-handle / symbol-miss dlerror behavior
hardened_semantics_by_symbol.dlclose: Native main-program handle close with deterministic refcounted invalid-handle rejection and thread-local dlerror contract

support_matrix_contract.dlerror_strict_semantics: Native thread-local dlerror: returns last dl* error message and clears error state per POSIX
support_matrix_contract.dlerror_hardened_semantics: Native thread-local dlerror with deterministic error-message return and state clearing

README.md: Interpose (`L0/L1`): `dlopen`, `dlsym`, and `dlclose` are classified as `WrapsHostLibc`; local main-program handles and self-contained pathname ELF64 DSOs use the phase-1 native path, while remaining loader cases delegate to host `ld.so`.
Hardened mode heals invalid `dlopen` flags to `RTLD_NOW` before local resolution
Replacement-level L2/L3 forbids any residual host `dlopen`/`dlsym`/`dlclose` fallback; any such call would be a release-blocking gate failure
FEATURE_PARITY.md: dlfcn boundary policy: phase-1 native local/pathname handles plus `WrapsHostLibc` interpose delegation for remaining loader cases; hardened invalid-flags repair is `RTLD_NOW`; replacement forbids residual host fallback
